# 学艺术史搞绘画的网友又把庞贝壁画造假捶死了

---

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzIwNzEzNzE5Ng==&mid=265066...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzIwNzEzNzE5Ng==&mid=2650669992&idx=1&sn=a34d47818152983af6a8b4c7a1d732d7&chksm=8ef41f5f7129be812c946303783170a48824b4e1563e914a79e5a9134eff26bf48899d912af3&mpshare=1&scene=1&srcid=0728J2orpoORcJyzo4dzN97M&sharer_shareinfo=531dbbf901be253be050fe6bad08704e&sharer_shareinfo_first=531dbbf901be253be050fe6bad08704e&from=groupmessage&isappinstalled=0&clicktime=1753690707&enterid=1753690707&ascene=1&devicetype=iOS18.5&version=18003d30&nettype=WIFI&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=itT+cG2rTKqpeZKJbsE7uSqESU6pLpt4NxEVVW9qq2Ha5jBo4BAuyp3jnGm8WeDi&wx_header=3)

何新老家伙

学艺术史搞绘画的网友又把庞贝壁画造假捶死了。还是那句话，用上科学技术这把利器，西方历史文物造假越来越成为过街老鼠了，根本见不得阳光。

![](.evernote-content/88F2D9A0-AB34-4922-9BC6-778918F401C1/62031BC7-76D2-4D19-8C1E-BA9D06A1477E.jpg)

---
